ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., button, icon, typography) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the component */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the component */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the component */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the component */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was last modified */,
  "is_inherited" INTEGER /* Indicate if the component inherits properties from a master set */,
  "master_component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the master component from which properties are inherited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_master_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("master_component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., size, color, style) */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  "is_inherited" INTEGER /* Indicate if the property is inherited from a master component */,
  "master_property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the master property from which the property is inherited */,
  "is_editable" INTEGER /* Indicate if the property is editable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_properties_master_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("master_property_id") REFERENCES component_properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_properties_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicate if the version is the current version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the team */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the team */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_components" (
  "team_component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-component relationship */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "is_override" INTEGER /* Indicate if the component properties are overridden */,
  "override_properties" TEXT /* JSON string of overridden properties */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_components_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_components_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, developer, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "user_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-team relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "action" TEXT /* Detailed action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the component has been used */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date the component was last used */,
  "total_views" INTEGER /* Total number of views */,
  "total_edits" INTEGER /* Total number of edits */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the component */,
  "total_downloads" INTEGER /* Total number of downloads */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_analytics_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date the component was validated */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "validation_type" TEXT /* Type of validation */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed results of the validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_validation_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the component */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback from the user */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicate if the review is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_reviews_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "dependent_component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component that depends on it */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_dependencies_dependent_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_dependencies_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
